item.title: Amgen's Rare Disease Drug Safety
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA has linked Amgen's rare inflammatory disease drug, likely canakinumab, to eight deaths and dozens of liver injuries, raising safety concerns and potentially impacting its use and regulatory status.
  • MoAs: Canakinumab is a monoclonal antibody that targets interleukin-1 beta (IL-1β), inhibiting inflammation.
  • Sources: Biospace
